entry.title: World Record Holder For Identifying 150 Car Logos In 1 Minute 7-Year Old Kevin Raahul

link.title: World Record Holder For Identifying 150 Car Logos In 1 Minute 7-Year Old Kevin Raahul

entry.content: Kevin Raahul, a 7-year old kid from Chennai holds the record for identifying 150 car logos in a minute. The kids name has now been entered into both the Asia and India Book of Records. The feat was accomplished by Kevin Raahul on the 27th of June 2020.
entry.summary: Kevin Raahul, a 7-year old kid from Chennai holds the record for identifying 150 car logos in a minute. The kids name has now been entered into both the Asia and India Book of Records. The feat was accomplished by Kevin Raahul on the 27th of June 2020.

entry.title: PhilHealth justifies biggest COVID-19 reimbursement for Davao City hospital

link.title: PhilHealth justifies biggest COVID-19 reimbursement for Davao City hospital

entry.content: The Philippine Health Insurance Corporation (PhilHealth) defended its decision to give the lion’s share of the reimbursement for coronavirus treatments to a hospital in Davao City – even if cases there are far fewer than in Metro Manila, the epicenter of the pandemic in the country. Full story:
entry.summary: The Philippine Health Insurance Corporation (PhilHealth) defended its decision to give the lion’s share of the reimbursement for coronavirus treatments to a hospital in Davao City – even if cases there are far fewer than in Metro Manila, the epicenter of the pandemic in the country. Full story:

entry.title: Jenna Dewan is struggling to breastfeed

link.title: Jenna Dewan is struggling to breastfeed

entry.content: Jenna Dewan has found breastfeeding her son to be "challenging", even though she didn’t struggle to feed her daughter Everly, now seven.
entry.summary: Jenna Dewan has found breastfeeding her son to be "challenging", even though she didn’t struggle to feed her daughter Everly, now seven.

entry.title: Enquête sur ces agressions qui se multiplient en France dans les lieux publics et les transports autour du port du masque

link.title: Enquête sur ces agressions qui se multiplient en France dans les lieux publics et les transports autour du port du masque

entry.content:
Les faits d’agressions en rapport avec le port du masque se multiplient ces derniers jours en France. Pour certains représentants syndicaux des transports en commun, ces agressions ne seraient qu’un catalyseur parmi d’autres de l’agressivité croissante des usagers.
Derniers en date ces deux adolescents de 16 ans soupçonnés d’avoir frappé une infirmière qui leur avait demandé de mettre un masque mardi dans un bus de Neuilly-sur-Marne ont été placés sous contrôle judiciaire à l’issue de leur garde à vue.
Les adolescents, nés en 2004 pour deux d’entre eux, se sont acharnés sur cette infirmière travaillant à l’hôpital de Ville-Evrard, à Neuilly-sur-Marne, "à coups de poings, de pieds et de tête avant de la mettre au sol", rapporte Le Parisien.
Présentant de "nombreuses plaies superficielles et contusions", la victime a refusé d’être prise en charge par les pompiers. Cinq jours d’incapacité totale de travail (ITT) lui ont été prescrits, selon une source proche de l’enquête.
Enquête sur ses agressions qui se multiplient en France dans les lieux publics et les transports autour du port du masque
entry.summary: Les faits d’agressions en rapport avec le port du masque se multiplient ces derniers jours en France. Pour certains représentants syndicaux des transports en commun, ces agressions ne seraient qu’un catalyseur parmi d’autres de l’agressivité croissante des usagers. Derniers en date ces deux adolescents de 16 ans soupçonnés d’avoir frappé une infirmière qui leur avait demandé de mettre un masque mardi dans un bus de Neuilly-sur-Marne ont été placés sous contrôle judiciaire à l’issue de leur garde à vue. Les adolescents, nés en 2004 pour deux d’entre eux, se sont acharnés sur cette infirmière travaillant à l’hôpital de Ville-Evrard, à Neuilly-sur-Marne, "à coups de poings, de pieds et de tête avant de la mettre au sol", rapporte Le Parisien. Présentant de "nombreuses plaies superficielles et contusions", la victime a refusé d’être prise en charge par les pompiers. Cinq jours d’incapacité totale de travail (ITT) lui ont été prescrits, selon une source proche de l’enquête. Enquête sur ses agressions qui se multiplient en France dans les lieux publics et les transports autour du port du masque

entry.title: Adjoumani clos le débat : pas de 3e mandat pour Ouattara, mais du 1er mandat de la 3e République

link.title: Adjoumani clos le débat : pas de 3e mandat pour Ouattara, mais du 1er mandat de la 3e République

entry.content: Invité hier au côté du président de la CEI Monsieur Coulibaly Kluibert sur les antennes de la Nouvelle Chaîne Ivoirienne (NCI), le Ministre Adjoumani porte-parole du RHDP, parti du président Ouattara a tenu à clarifier sa position sur la question du 3e mandat du président de la République. Répondant au journaliste, le Ministre n’a pas manqué d’expliquer à nouveau la question du 3e mandat que l’opposition qualifie de coup d’état constitutionnel "Vous êtes en Côte d’Ivoire, quand vous parlez de 3e mandat ; le président Allasane va avoir son 3e mandat. C’est un lapsus de langage. Avoir un mandat ça veut dire qu’on a été élu pour exécuter un mandat… Même l’opposition donne déjà le pouvoir au président Allasane alors qu’on n’est pas allé à des élections. Le président Allasane va avoir un 3e mandat : il ne s’agit pas de 3e mandat. On s’évertue à vous l’expliquer. Il n’est pas question de 3e mandat ; il est question du 1er mandat de la 3e République et le président Allasane Ouattara peut bel et bien être candidat à ces élections"
entry.summary: Invité hier au côté du président de la CEI Monsieur Coulibaly Kluibert sur les antennes de la Nouvelle Chaîne Ivoirienne (NCI), le Ministre Adjoumani porte-parole du RHDP, parti du président Ouattara a tenu à clarifier sa position sur la question du 3e mandat du président de la République. Répondant au journaliste, le Ministre n’a pas manqué d’expliquer à nouveau la question du 3e mandat que l’opposition qualifie de coup d’état constitutionnel "Vous êtes en Côte d’Ivoire, quand vous parlez de 3e mandat ; le président Allasane va avoir son 3e mandat. C’est un lapsus de langage. Avoir un mandat ça veut dire qu’on a été élu pour exécuter un mandat… Même l’opposition donne déjà le pouvoir au président Allasane alors qu’on n’est pas allé à des élections. Le président Allasane va avoir un 3e mandat : il ne s’agit pas de 3e mandat. On s’évertue à vous l’expliquer. Il n’est pas question de 3e mandat ; il est question du 1er mandat de la 3e République et le président Allasane Ouattara peut bel et bien être candidat à ces élections"

entry.title: Why a Prominent American Artist Paints Skin Pitch-Black

link.title: Why a Prominent American Artist Paints Skin Pitch-Black

entry.content: The artist Grace Lynne Haynes describes her process for portraying the American abolitionist Sojourner Truth’s fight for broader equality in her first New Yorker cover.
entry.summary: The artist Grace Lynne Haynes describes her process for portraying the American abolitionist Sojourner Truth’s fight for broader equality in her first New Yorker cover.

entry.title: La Réunion : la rentrée scolaire sous haute protection sanitaire

link.title: La Réunion : la rentrée scolaire sous haute protection sanitaire

entry.content:
Alors que les élèves réunionnais ont fait leur retour en classe lundi 17 août, plusieurs établissement ont été contraints de reporter la rentrée scolaire après la découverte de foyers de coronavirus.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Santé : les médecins urgentistes sur tous les fronts cet été

link.title: Santé : les médecins urgentistes sur tous les fronts cet été

entry.content:
Pendant la saison estivale, le renfort de médecins dans les lieux touristiques n’est pas nouveau. Mais la présence d’urgentistes au plus près des vacanciers est jugée particulièrement vitale cet été. Illustration à Biscarosse (Landes) où la population a été multipliée par dix. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Pendant la saison estivale, le renfort de médecins dans les lieux touristiques n’est pas nouveau. Mais la présence d’urgentistes au plus près des vacanciers est jugée particulièrement vitale cet été. Illustration à Biscarosse (Landes) où la population a été multipliée par dix. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Croatie : Split, une ville à l’héritage historique impressionnant

link.title: Croatie : Split, une ville à l’héritage historique impressionnant

entry.content:
Elle est la deuxième ville de Croatie. Chaque année, les touristes profitent de Split, dans un cadre magnifique marqué par l’histoire.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Omer sueños robados capítulo 143 lunes 10 de agosto del 2020 completo en español latino

link.title: Omer sueños robados capítulo 143 lunes 10 de agosto del 2020 completo en español latino

entry.content: Meryem es una joven que ha pasado los últimos cinco años criando a su hermano adoptivo Ömer, llegando a trabajar día y noche para que ambos tengan una vida decente. Solo era una adolescente cuando una persona le entregó a Ömer a su papá, quien al ser encarcelado vio frustrado su intento de vender al niño. Poco sabe ella que Ömer es el hijo secuestrado de un adinerado hombre, Levent Metehanoğlu, a quien conocerán inesperadamente.
entry.summary: Meryem es una joven que ha pasado los últimos cinco años criando a su hermano adoptivo Ömer, llegando a trabajar día y noche para que ambos tengan una vida decente. Solo era una adolescente cuando una persona le entregó a Ömer a su papá, quien al ser encarcelado vio frustrado su intento de vender al niño. Poco sabe ella que Ömer es el hijo secuestrado de un adinerado hombre, Levent Metehanoğlu, a quien conocerán inesperadamente.

entry.title: Woman Makes Disgusted Face Seeing Baby’s Photo Before Realizing She Was on Video Call With Parent

link.title: Woman Makes Disgusted Face Seeing Baby’s Photo Before Realizing She Was on Video Call With Parent

entry.content: This woman’s daughter pulled the "ugly baby prank" on her. She came up to her to show a friend’s baby’s photo on her phone. The woman looked at the photo and made a disgusted face. Seeing her straightforward reaction, her daughter told her that she was on a video call with the mother of the baby, and she might have seen her reaction. The woman got embarrassed and tried to cover her face, while her husband called the baby beautiful to cover up the awkward moment.
entry.summary: This woman’s daughter pulled the "ugly baby prank" on her. She came up to her to show a friend’s baby’s photo on her phone. The woman looked at the photo and made a disgusted face. Seeing her straightforward reaction, her daughter told her that she was on a video call with the mother of the baby, and she might have seen her reaction. The woman got embarrassed and tried to cover her face, while her husband called the baby beautiful to cover up the awkward moment.

entry.title: This Indian man’s heart beats in the middle of his belly

link.title: This Indian man’s heart beats in the middle of his belly

entry.content: Extraordinary footage has emerged of a man born with his heart outside his rib cage, beating under just a thin layer of skin. The video is of Arpit Gohil, whose parents were told he would almost certainly die when he was born with the extremely rare condition. Now 18, the boy in the video is being hailed by doctors as a ‘medical miracle’, who say a slight fall or bump could kill him instantly. Known as Pentalogy of Cantrell, the rare condition affects foetus development and causes babies to be born with vital organs (such as the heart or intestines) on the outside of their bodies. Most children with the condition would be treated with kid gloves, wrapped in cotton wool and refrain from unnecessary risks. But Arpit, who was born with the most serious form of the disorder known as ‘ectopia cordis’ of which there are just 165 known cases, is no ordinary man. Growing up, he appeared like any other boy, climbing trees and driving a tractor on his father’s farm 40km from Ahmedabad, in Gujarat state, India. As his heart pumps beneath the skin in his chest, he added: ‘I can do everything like a normal person and don’t have any trouble with my jobs on the farm, whether it be tilling the land, driving a tractor or riding a bike.’ However because part of his diaphragm doesn’t work, the rest of the muscles are working overtime. This means that any other infection he might pick up, such as pneumonia, would be much worse for him than for a normal patient. Dr Sanjeeth Peter, director of the Nadiad-based DDMM Heart Institute, warned that Arpit could die at any second. ‘He has learned to cope with the defect but he is very vulnerable, and we don’t know how much longer he can continue living as he does at the moment,’ he told MailOnline. ‘But if he slips and falls, or he is bumped, it could do serious damage. ‘He holds himself carefully to protect his heart but, and particularly because he works on a farm, it is not 100 per cent safe.’ As soon as their son was born at home in Chhapra, India, in 1997, Arpit’s s parents took him to hospital in Nadiad after becoming aware of his serious complaint. Doctors thought he had been born with two hearts, but a sonograph revealed he had one heart outside his rib cage. They told his parents Arpit had almost no change of survival. But his father, Vikrambhai, revealed: ‘Since he was little, my son has never experienced any complications. ‘At times, I felt he was actually healthier than the normal boys of his age. So I never took him to a doctor. I never thought about having him operated on.’ Now Arpit is considering having an operation to move his heart into its correct position after reading of a similar case of a girl in China. On examining Arpit, Dr Peter discovered five defects including an abdominal disorder above his belly button and a defect inside his heart. ‘He is OK for the time being,’ said Dr Peter. ‘But he could develop respiratory problems or circulatory problems at any time, because the problem is putting so much
entry.summary: Extraordinary footage has emerged of a man born with his heart outside his rib cage, beating under just a thin layer of skin. The video is of Arpit Gohil, whose parents were told he would almost certainly die when he was born with the extremely rare condition. Now 18, the boy in the video is being hailed by doctors as a ‘medical miracle’, who say a slight fall or bump could kill him instantly. Known as Pentalogy of Cantrell, the rare condition affects foetus development and causes babies to be born with vital organs (such as the heart or intestines) on the outside of their bodies. Most children with the condition would be treated with kid gloves, wrapped in cotton wool and refrain from unnecessary risks. But Arpit, who was born with the most serious form of the disorder known as ‘ectopia cordis’ of which there are just 165 known cases, is no ordinary man. Growing up, he appeared like any other boy, climbing trees and driving a tractor on his father’s farm 40km from Ahmedabad, in Gujarat state, India. As his heart pumps beneath the skin in his chest, he added: ‘I can do everything like a normal person and don’t have any trouble with my jobs on the farm, whether it be tilling the land, driving a tractor or riding a bike.’ However because part of his diaphragm doesn’t work, the rest of the muscles are working overtime. This means that any other infection he might pick up, such as pneumonia, would be much worse for him than for a normal patient. Dr Sanjeeth Peter, director of the Nadiad-based DDMM Heart Institute, warned that Arpit could die at any second. ‘He has learned to cope with the defect but he is very vulnerable, and we don’t know how much longer he can continue living as he does at the moment,’ he told MailOnline. ‘But if he slips and falls, or he is bumped, it could do serious damage. ‘He holds himself carefully to protect his heart but, and particularly because he works on a farm, it is not 100 per cent safe.’ As soon as their son was born at home in Chhapra, India, in 1997, Arpit’s s parents took him to hospital in Nadiad after becoming aware of his serious complaint. Doctors thought he had been born with two hearts, but a sonograph revealed he had one heart outside his rib cage. They told his parents Arpit had almost no change of survival. But his father, Vikrambhai, revealed: ‘Since he was little, my son has never experienced any complications. ‘At times, I felt he was actually healthier than the normal boys of his age. So I never took him to a doctor. I never thought about having him operated on.’ Now Arpit is considering having an operation to move his heart into its correct position after reading of a similar case of a girl in China. On examining Arpit, Dr Peter discovered five defects including an abdominal disorder above his belly button and a defect inside his heart. ‘He is OK for the time being,’ said Dr Peter. ‘But he could develop respiratory problems or circulatory problems at any time, because the problem is putting so much

entry.title: Bendera Merah Putih Raksasa, Untuk Sambut hari Kemerdekaan

link.title: Bendera Merah Putih Raksasa, Untuk Sambut hari Kemerdekaan

entry.content:
Jembrana, KOMPASTV - Inilah Fatmawatinya kelurahan loloan timur kabupaten jembrana.
Di rumah panggung yang terbuat dari kayu inilah, Rachil Ifkar salah satu pemuda loloan timur menjahit dan menyatukan kain berwarma merah dan putih sepanjang 45 meter agar menyatu menjadi merah putih
Dijembatan bersejarah sarif tua loloan yang menyatukan kelurahan loloan timur dan loloan barat inilah bendera sepanjang 45 meter dan lebar 3 meter ini dipasang
Jembatan beli, begitu warga jembrana menyebutnya adalah saksi bisu perjuangan warga jembrana pada masa itu, serta saksi sejarah masuknya agama islam dikabupaten jembrana bali pertama kalinya
Kini memperingati HUT RI ke 75, pemuda di kedua kelurahan ini bersatu membentangkan bendera merah putih raksasa sepanjang 45 meter di atas jembantan ini, serta mendandani jembatan ini dengan hiasan merah putih
Selain dalam rangka memperingati HUT RI ke 75, aksi pemuda dikabupaten jembrana ini juga sebagai bentuk penghormatan kepada para pejuang yang telah merebut kemerdekaan/serta untuk mengedukasi masyarakat jembrana terutama anak muda tentang arti penting jembatan ini sebagai bagian dari saksi sejarah kemerdekaan
#benedera #indonesia #merahputih #dirgahayu75 #harikemerdekaan #jembrana #bali
entry.summary: Jembrana, KOMPASTV - Inilah Fatmawatinya kelurahan loloan timur kabupaten jembrana. Di rumah panggung yang terbuat dari kayu inilah, Rachil Ifkar salah satu pemuda loloan timur menjahit dan menyatukan kain berwarma merah dan putih sepanjang 45 meter agar menyatu menjadi merah putih Dijembatan bersejarah sarif tua loloan yang menyatukan kelurahan loloan timur dan loloan barat inilah bendera sepanjang 45 meter dan lebar 3 meter ini dipasang Jembatan beli, begitu warga jembrana menyebutnya adalah saksi bisu perjuangan warga jembrana pada masa itu, serta saksi sejarah masuknya agama islam dikabupaten jembrana bali pertama kalinya Kini memperingati HUT RI ke 75, pemuda di kedua kelurahan ini bersatu membentangkan bendera merah putih raksasa sepanjang 45 meter di atas jembantan ini, serta mendandani jembatan ini dengan hiasan merah putih Selain dalam rangka memperingati HUT RI ke 75, aksi pemuda dikabupaten jembrana ini juga sebagai bentuk penghormatan kepada para pejuang yang telah merebut kemerdekaan/serta untuk mengedukasi masyarakat jembrana terutama anak muda tentang arti penting jembatan ini sebagai bagian dari saksi sejarah kemerdekaan #benedera #indonesia #merahputih #dirgahayu75 #harikemerdekaan #jembrana #bali

entry.title: Sturgeon sets out coronavirus testing plan for Scotland

link.title: Sturgeon sets out coronavirus testing plan for Scotland

entry.content: First Minister Nicola Sturgeon has set out a plan to increase testing for Covid-19 in Scotland to 65,000 a day before the Autumn. Report by Blairm. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
entry.summary: First Minister Nicola Sturgeon has set out a plan to increase testing for Covid-19 in Scotland to 65,000 a day before the Autumn. Report by Blairm. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at

entry.title: There Are Doubts Over a Fair Election in 2020

link.title: There Are Doubts Over a Fair Election in 2020

entry.content: Roughly a quarter of voters have doubts that their vote will be counted in the 2020 election. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.
entry.summary: Roughly a quarter of voters have doubts that their vote will be counted in the 2020 election. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.

entry.summary: SAVED BY THE BELL Reboot Official Trailer (2020) Revival, Mario Lopez, Elizabeth Berkeley, New Series HD

entry.title: Alessandra Sublet toujours en couple : c’est l’amour fou avec Jordan

link.title: Alessandra Sublet toujours en couple : c’est l’amour fou avec Jordan

entry.content:
Alessandra Sublet : c’est l’amour fou avec Jordan.
Alessandra Sublet n’est toujours pas un coeur à prendre. .
L’animatrice avait récemment semé le doute à propos de sa vie amoureuse… .
laissant entendre que son histoire avec son compagnon Jordan appartenait désormais au passé.
Mais la réalité serait bien différente, si l’on en croit sa dernière publication Instagram. .
Mardi 11 août, elle a ainsi dévoilé un adorable cliché complice avec son compagnon de 29 ans.
"On appelle ça de l’amour", a-t-elle simplement écrit, laissant ainsi comprendre qu’elle n’est pas du tout célibataire.
Interrogée à propos de son confinement avec son ex-mari Clément Miserez, qui est également le père de ses deux enfants, Charlie et Alphonse, .
la présentatrice de TF1 avait assuré être en bons termes avec celui-ci au point de cohabiter.
Ça s’est très bien passé. Même si nous ne sommes plus avec ces personnes, tout est une question d’organisation, Alessandra Sublet.
Alessandra Sublet concilie visiblement à la perfection ses ancienne et nouvelle vies.
entry.summary: Alessandra Sublet : c’est l’amour fou avec Jordan. Alessandra Sublet n’est toujours pas un coeur à prendre. . L’animatrice avait récemment semé le doute à propos de sa vie amoureuse… . laissant entendre que son histoire avec son compagnon Jordan appartenait désormais au passé. Mais la réalité serait bien différente, si l’on en croit sa dernière publication Instagram. . Mardi 11 août, elle a ainsi dévoilé un adorable cliché complice avec son compagnon de 29 ans. "On appelle ça de l’amour", a-t-elle simplement écrit, laissant ainsi comprendre qu’elle n’est pas du tout célibataire. Interrogée à propos de son confinement avec son ex-mari Clément Miserez, qui est également le père de ses deux enfants, Charlie et Alphonse, . la présentatrice de TF1 avait assuré être en bons termes avec celui-ci au point de cohabiter. Ça s’est très bien passé. Même si nous ne sommes plus avec ces personnes, tout est une question d’organisation, Alessandra Sublet. Alessandra Sublet concilie visiblement à la perfection ses ancienne et nouvelle vies.

entry.title: Feeling Super Lazy? Here’s How You Know You Need to Get Up & Exercise!

link.title: Feeling Super Lazy? Here’s How You Know You Need to Get Up & Exercise!

entry.content: The COVID-19 pandemic has put just about everything in life on hold and that may include exercise and getting out, which may have led you to gain a few pounds. Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.
entry.summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has put just about everything in life on hold and that may include exercise and getting out, which may have led you to gain a few pounds. Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.

entry.title: Stop being selfish, let police do their job, says IGP

link.title: Stop being selfish, let police do their job, says IGP

entry.content:
The Inspector-General of Police Tan Sri Abdul Hamid Bador has told off the many "experts" who have spoken out on the M. Indira Gandhi case to stop being selfish and let the police do their job.
He said there are many religious and NGO champions who are trying to score political points.
It was reported that the lawyers of Indira were asking if Hamid knew the location of her daughter Prasana Diksa and ex-husband K. Pathmanathan (who is now known as Muhammad Riduan Abdullah) – who have been missing for 11 years.
entry.summary: The Inspector-General of Police Tan Sri Abdul Hamid Bador has told off the many "experts" who have spoken out on the M. Indira Gandhi case to stop being selfish and let the police do their job. He said there are many religious and NGO champions who are trying to score political points. It was reported that the lawyers of Indira were asking if Hamid knew the location of her daughter Prasana Diksa and ex-husband K. Pathmanathan (who is now known as Muhammad Riduan Abdullah) – who have been missing for 11 years.
